text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No one utters a word. Such is the gravity of the
situation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Kikuka Sho, and the
paranormal phenomena are finally calming...
Today, Manhattan Cafe's abilities will be put to
the test.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer, this is the first time.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The first time I've felt before a race that... I might
be able to catch up to my friend...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her smile is without its usual anguish. I watch over
her, hoping that today's race will finally bring us
to the light at the end of our long tunnel.
